title: Homepage renders a separate proof strip despite the one-surface homepage contract
reasoning: The homepage renders ProofStrip immediately before the selected Work list, while the current redesign contract says homepage projects should use one selected-work surface and the implementation notes state project proof appears once through the Work section. This creates a duplicated proof/navigation surface in the first scan path and weakens the edited-index requirement.
reproduction: Open `/` and observe the proof strip links rendered before the Work section, followed by the selected build cards.
recommendation: Remove ProofStrip from the homepage or fold its strongest proof into the Work section so project proof appears in one intentional surface.
whyTestsDoNotAlreadyCoverThis: No linked tests are included, and there is no homepage DOM/spec assertion that prevents multiple selected-proof surfaces.
suggestedRegressionTest: Add a homepage render test that asserts the route exposes one selected-work/proof surface and does not render `.proof-strip` before the Work section.
minimumFixScope: Update `src/pages/index.astro` to remove or repurpose `ProofStrip` and the `proofSignals` data for the homepage.

history.note: Implemented in working tree; native checks pass. Full Clawpatch provider revalidation was curtailed after confirming first five fixes because it was too slow.
